user_query: I want to get better at playing piano. Add a new learning project called 'Piano Practice' and add a task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

create_info.description: Piano Practice; Task, practice scales for 30 minutes every day

fields.name: Piano Practice
fields.description: A project focused on improving piano skills through daily practice.

result.reasoning: The user wants to add a new learning project. The 'Learning' category is the most semantically relevant parent. I am appending it to the end of the project list within that category. Note: The requested task 'practice scales' should be added as a child of this new project in a subsequent operation or as part of the project initialization if the system supports nested creation, but here I am defining the Project node as requested by the Node Type hint.
